metadata.note: This is sample data demonstrating the expected format. To collect real data, ensure X cookies are valid and run the collection script.

tweets.author: @OpenAI
tweets.text: Excited to announce improvements to GPT-4 Turbo with enhanced reasoning capabilities and reduced latency. Now available in the API with 128K context window.

tweets.author: @AnthropicAI
tweets.text: Claude 3.5 Sonnet now supports extended context up to 200K tokens with improved accuracy on long-document tasks. Perfect for code analysis and research papers.

tweets.author: @sama
tweets.text: The pace of AI progress continues to accelerate. What seemed impossible 6 months ago is now routine. The next 12 months will be even more transformative.

tweets.author: @GoogleDeepMind
tweets.text: New research: Gemini 2.0 achieves state-of-the-art performance on multimodal reasoning tasks, combining vision, language, and code understanding in a single model.

tweets.author: @karpathy
tweets.text: Fascinating to see how AI coding assistants are evolving. The best ones now understand project context, suggest architectural improvements, and even refactor code intelligently.

tweets.author: @SimonWillison
tweets.text: Just tried the new MCP (Model Context Protocol) implementation in Claude Desktop. Game changer for connecting LLMs to local tools and databases. Thread with examples 🧵

tweets.author: @LangChainAI
tweets.text: LangChain 0.2.0 released! 🎉 New features: native MCP support, improved agent memory, and 40% faster execution. Full changelog: [link]

tweets.author: @llama_index
tweets.text: New tutorial: Building production-ready RAG systems with LlamaIndex and GPT-4. Covers chunking strategies, embedding optimization, and retrieval evaluation.

tweets.author: @huggingface
tweets.text: 🤗 New on the Hub: 50+ open-source models fine-tuned for code generation. Including specialized models for Python, JavaScript, Rust, and SQL. All Apache 2.0 licensed!

tweets.author: @jerryjliu0
tweets.text: Excited about the convergence of RAG and agents. The future is systems that can both retrieve knowledge AND take actions based on that knowledge. Building this into LlamaIndex.

tweets.author: @hwchase17
tweets.text: The shift from 'prompt engineering' to 'agent engineering' is real. It's no longer about crafting the perfect prompt, but designing robust agent workflows with proper error handling and feedback loops.

tweets.author: @ClementDelangue
tweets.text: Hugging Face now hosts over 500K models! The open-source AI ecosystem is thriving. Special shoutout to the community for making this possible. 🚀

tweets.author: @OpenAI
tweets.text: ChatGPT Enterprise now includes advanced data analysis with code interpreter, custom GPTs for your organization, and enhanced security features. Learn more: [link]

tweets.author: @AnthropicAI
tweets.text: Reminder: Claude's constitutional AI approach means it's designed to be helpful, harmless, and honest. We're constantly improving these safety measures while maintaining capability.

tweets.author: @SimonWillison
tweets.text: Pro tip: When building with LLMs, always implement streaming responses. The perceived latency improvement is massive, even if the total time is the same. Users love seeing progress.
